generations.code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v >= 2 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # No duplicates, compute permutation parity
    # sorted_a[i] should go to position i
    # a[j] = sorted_a[i] means a[j] needs to go to position i
    # So permutation p where p[j] = i (position in sorted array)
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    perm = [pos[v] for v in a]
    
    # Compute parity of perm
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            parity += cycle_len - 1
    
    print("YES" if parity % 2 == 0 else "NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    if max(cnt.values()) > 1:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # No duplicates - compute permutation parity
    # sorted array gives target positions
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    # pos[v] = index in sorted array (0-indexed)
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    
    # perm[i] = where element at position i should go
    perm = [pos[a[i]] for i in range(n)]
    
    visited = [False] * n
    num_transpositions = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            num_transpositions += cycle_len - 1
    
    if num_transpositions % 2 == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

pipelines.final_code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    has_dup = any(v >= 2 for v in cnt.values())
    
    if has_dup:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # No duplicates, compute permutation parity
    # sorted_a[i] should go to position i
    # a[j] = sorted_a[i] means a[j] needs to go to position i
    # So permutation p where p[j] = i (position in sorted array)
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    perm = [pos[v] for v in a]
    
    # Compute parity of perm
    visited = [False] * n
    parity = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            parity += cycle_len - 1
    
    print("YES" if parity % 2 == 0 else "NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()

pipelines.final_code:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n = int(input())
    a = list(map(int, input().split()))
    
    # Check for duplicates
    from collections import Counter
    cnt = Counter(a)
    if max(cnt.values()) > 1:
        print("YES")
        return
    
    # No duplicates - compute permutation parity
    # sorted array gives target positions
    sorted_a = sorted(a)
    # pos[v] = index in sorted array (0-indexed)
    pos = {v: i for i, v in enumerate(sorted_a)}
    
    # perm[i] = where element at position i should go
    perm = [pos[a[i]] for i in range(n)]
    
    visited = [False] * n
    num_transpositions = 0
    for i in range(n):
        if not visited[i]:
            cycle_len = 0
            j = i
            while not visited[j]:
                visited[j] = True
                j = perm[j]
                cycle_len += 1
            num_transpositions += cycle_len - 1
    
    if num_transpositions % 2 == 0:
        print("YES")
    else:
        print("NO")

t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    solve()
